summary: The diff implements most of the required features across REQ-1 through REQ-6. REQ-1 adds new templates (Regal Emerald, Pastel Garden visible in truncated diff). REQ-2 enhances TemplateSelector with categories and badges. REQ-3 adds advanced customization controls in TemplateThemeStep. REQ-4 updates backend/main.mo with savedThemes and new functions. REQ-5 adds Save Theme section in TemplateThemeStep. REQ-6 adds new React Query hooks. However, there are some gaps: the 'Save as Single Theme' button only shows a toast without persisting; CreateInvitationWizard.tsx is not visibly modified; the migration module was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: In CreateInvitationWizard.tsx, add a 'Save Theme' section on the TemplateThemeStep with 'Save as Single Theme' and 'Save as Theme Variant' buttons.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary for CreateInvitationWizard.tsx shows no modification — only InvitationEditor.tsx is noted as passing invitationId to TemplateThemeStep. The wizard file does not appear to have been updated to pass invitationId or add Save Theme functionality.

missing_requirements.requirement: 'Save as Single Theme' button must actually save and persist the active template config, replacing any previously active theme.
missing_requirements.reason: In TemplateThemeStep.tsx, handleSaveAsSingle only calls toast.success without invoking any backend mutation or update operation to persist the active theme.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data migration from old invitation records to new ones with savedThemes.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to update backend/main.mo with new fields and functions. A separate migration.mo file was not requested.
